## Summary

Describe the problem and the smallest change that addresses it.

## Validation

List the commands run and their outcomes.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and preserves the local-first, Gmail read-only privacy boundary.
- [ ] Tests use only synthetic data and reserved/example domains.
- [ ] No mailbox data, credentials, OAuth values, private paths, databases, or exports are included.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog entries are updated when the public contract changes.
- [ ] The complete validation gate passes, or any unavailable check is explained.
